response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial contributions, they lack direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, have no demonstrated work with routing tiles, navigation systems, or distributed systems for map data freshness/latency, and their core stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — none of which align with the job's primary requirement of modern C++ for high-performance routing infrastructure.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Proven ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
Active contributor to testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling ecosystems
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in commercial systems
Lacks exposure to routing data pipelines, navigation systems, or geospatial tiling
Primary technical stack (JS/TS/DLang) does not match core requirement of C++ for low-latency routing
